name: The-One-File
desc: One file. Everything connected. Map networks, smart homes, sports plays, mind maps, or infrastructure in a single self contained file. Offline first, animated,…
descFull: One file. Everything connected. Map networks, smart homes, sports plays, mind maps, or infrastructure in a single self contained file. Offline first, animated, encrypted, fully styled. Networkening adds live status & icons. TheOneFile_Verse enables real-time collaboration via Docker.
